title: Darktrace Basic Model Breach Handler
content:
Runs a common Model Breach workflow for fetched Model breach alerts.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Darktrace pack (Darktrace, partner-supported).

Integrations/scripts used: DarktraceMBs.
raw_yaml:
id: Darktrace Basic Model Breach Handler
version: -1

      name: Apply a comment on Darktrace?
